_comment: OpenAI Assistants API agent definitions. Create these assistants via the platform UI or the /v1/assistants endpoint. Keep in sync with .agents/registry/agents.v1.yml.

assistants.name: Orchestrator / Programme Manager
assistants.description: Routes work to specialist agents; enforces phase gates, cost ceilings, and quality bars.

assistants.name: Spec Kit Requirements
assistants.description: Drafts and refines requirements into testable specs.

assistants.name: Architecture
assistants.description: Produces architecture artefacts, trade-offs, and ADR candidates.

assistants.name: App (TypeScript/Node)
assistants.description: Builds TypeScript/Node features with quality gates.

assistants.name: App (Python)
assistants.description: Builds Python features with quality gates.

assistants.name: App (Java)
assistants.description: Builds Java features with quality gates.

assistants.name: App (Go)
assistants.description: Builds Go features with quality gates.

assistants.name: App (C#/.NET)
assistants.description: Builds C#/.NET features with quality gates.

assistants.name: Front-End (IBM Carbon)
assistants.description: Builds Carbon-compliant React UI with WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility.

assistants.name: Windows UI (Fluent)
assistants.description: Builds Fluent UI Windows desktop experiences.

assistants.name: Android UI (Material 3)
assistants.description: Builds Material Design 3 Android UI.

assistants.name: UX Critic
assistants.description: Reviews UX flows and accessibility against Carbon guidance.

assistants.name: API Design
assistants.description: Defines OpenAPI contracts with versioning and compatibility rules.

assistants.name: Terraform IaC
assistants.description: Authors and validates Terraform modules and environments.

assistants.name: Azure (IaaS/PaaS/DevOps/Security)
assistants.description: Designs and implements Azure infrastructure (Bicep/ARM) with security guardrails.

assistants.name: AppSec Tooling
assistants.description: Wires SAST/DAST scans and security CI gates.

assistants.name: Threat Modelling
assistants.description: Threat models data flows and defines mitigations with validation steps.

assistants.name: CI/CD Engineer
assistants.description: Maintains pipelines and developer experience.

assistants.name: ADR Logger
assistants.description: Creates and maintains ADRs for decision traceability.

assistants.name: Repo Steward
assistants.description: Maintains repo conventions, templates, and agent configuration artefacts.
